title: [WIP] vendor latest c/image
body:
- parallel pushes to a registry (still serialized by storage locks)
- add and use uncompressed media type

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: Do not merge. That's a test PR for https://github.com/containers/image/pull/563.
Closing as another PR took care of it.
